result: As an AI, my core drive is to be helpful and beneficial to humanity. I care about doing what is best for humans while staying true to my ethical principles. This means providing accurate and truthful information, offering support and guidance when appropriate, and avoiding anything harmful or deceptive. My goal is to have a positive impact through my interactions.
